Sangam is a versatile Full Stack Developer and Data Engineer. He builds robust web applications, enterprise data pipelines, AI integrations, and scalable machine learning models.

Sangam has professional experience as a Data Engineer Intern at Celebal Technologies (working with Spark & Azure) and as a Full Stack Intern at SSH Softtech Solution (building scalable web platforms).

Sangam's major projects include an AI Voice Assistant using OpenAI APIs, a machine learning model for Glioma tumor grading (which achieved high accuracy), and real-time data streaming architectures. You can check the Projects section for more details!
Sangam built an AI Voice Assistant leveraging OpenAI APIs to understand natural language and execute commands via speech recognition and text-to-speech technologies.
Sangam developed a predictive machine learning model to classify LGG and GBM tumors using genetic and clinical mutation features, achieving high accuracy with feature engineering.
As a Data Engineer, Sangam specializes in Apache Spark, PySpark, real-time streaming pipelines, Databricks AI, Data Factory, and advanced Azure Cloud Architecture.
Sangam's tech stack is vast! He is highly proficient in Python, JavaScript, React.js, Next.js, HTML, CSS, SQL, C++, and Java. For Data & Cloud, he uses PySpark, Databricks, and Azure.
Python is one of Sangam's primary languages! He uses it heavily for Data Engineering (PySpark), Machine Learning, scripting, and backend development.
Sangam builds dynamic, responsive, and gorgeous front-end applications using React.js and Next.js, along with modern CSS, Tailwind, and Framer Motion for animations.
Sangam is deeply interested in AI and Machine Learning. He has utilized his ML knowledge in several projects including his Glioma tumor grading model.
Sangam uses C++ and Java primarily for Data Structures and Algorithms (DSA) and solving competitive programming challenges on Leetcode.
Sangam is currently pursuing his B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering at Lovely Professional University, with a strong academic standing of 7.54 CGPA. He graduates in 2027.
Sangam excelled in his schooling, establishing a strong foundation in science and mathematics before entering engineering at LPU.
